---
title: "Frances Eliza Crompton"
---

## Frances Eliza Crompton

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1892-8), children's writer

### Biography

She wrote <i>The Gentle Heritage</i> (1920); she was described by CMY as 'singularly unambitious'.

### Letters

- Letter from July 27th 1889

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
